mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, actor_id, type, post_id, comment_id, message_id, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{postId}, #{commentId}, #{messageId}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.type, n.actor_id, actor.nickname AS actor_name, actor.avatar_url AS actor_avatar_url, n.post_id, n.comment_id, n.message_id, n.content, n.is_read AS `read`, n.created_at FROM notifications n JOIN users actor ON actor.id = n.actor_id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
